displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: La Costena Salsa De Habanero Verde Sauce is a delicious, spicy Mexican hot sauce made from green habanero chilies, vinegar and spices. Nice and fruity, this vinegar-based sauce features green habaneros that provide a flavorful kick. A terrific all ’round table sauce to splash on eggs, pizza, tacos and more.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Chillies Brand is presenting a new local inspired treats. Exciting! Loved by many in Singapore & Asia! Chillies Brand Hae Bee Hiam is made of All Natural Ingredients, contain bits of Premium Dried Shrimps and it is as authentic as freshly served. Apart from the Natural Ingredients, it is also made with traditional processes to achieve the desired and authentic taste. You can have it with plain rice, porridge, noodles, bread or as a condiment to enhance the flavours of your meat and vegetables, whichever you prefer! We would call it a condiment that reminds us of childhood. All Natural: Trans fat free No added MSG No artificial preservative No added artificial colouring.

displayMetadata.name: COUNTRY/PLACE OF ORIGIN
displayMetadata.value: Malaysia

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Keep dry and store away from heat
